importRule: files <= 64 KiB are imported; larger release files stay hash references pinned by the packet's own manifest.json
ciRule: CI golden input is ONLY this directory - tests must never read local-docs (BF.5 rule)

items.description: ADAPTER-P0-R5 strict-blind-passed serialization_binding card (vector length bound contract)
LLM-MINING-P0 strong-model GO product: full 15-file release package (Lean proof + Circom + Groth16 + Solidity verifier + EVM result)
